api_id.description: Aircall API ID, used as the HTTP Basic auth username. Never logged.

api_token.description: Aircall API token, used as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Aircall API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only calls/contacts created at or after this time are read (sent as the unix-seconds `from` filter).
